scenarios.description: outputSettings(OutputSettings) with a modified OutputSettings instance sets and returns this Document
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = new Document("http://example.com"); Document.OutputSettings custom = new Document.OutputSettings().prettyPrint(false).indentAmount(5);
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is doc and doc.outputSettings() == custom

scenarios.description: outputSettings(OutputSettings) with null argument throws IllegalArgumentException and leaves field unchanged
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = new Document("http://example.com"); // capture original via reflection
scenarios.expectedResult: throws IllegalArgumentException and doc.outputSettings() remains original instance
